properties.name: Toucheng East Corridor (intl. landings)
properties.notes: Main international landing cluster on Taiwan's northeast coast.

properties.name: Tamsui North Corridor (intl. landings)
properties.notes: Northern approaches; crosses the Taiwan–Matsu ferry lanes.

properties.name: Fangshan Southwest Corridor (SMW3/FLAG/APG)
properties.notes: Southwest corridor toward the South China Sea and Luzon Strait.

properties.name: Taiwan-Matsu No.2/3 (domestic)
properties.notes: Domestic link repeatedly damaged in 2023–2025 incidents.

properties.name: Taiwan-Penghu No.3 (domestic)
properties.notes: Domestic link across the Taiwan Strait shallows.

properties.name: Busan South Corridor (intl. landings)
properties.notes: Korea's main international landing cluster; heavy anchorage traffic nearby.

properties.name: Geoje South Corridor (intl. landings)
properties.notes: Southern approaches shared with Busan-bound shipping lanes.

properties.name: Taean West Corridor (Yellow Sea)
properties.notes: Yellow Sea landing corridor; shallow water, dense fishing activity.

properties.name: Kitaibaraki North Corridor (intl. landings)
properties.notes: Trans-Pacific landings on the Ibaraki coast.

properties.name: Chikura Corridor (Boso peninsula)
properties.notes: Dense trans-Pacific landing cluster at the tip of the Boso peninsula.

properties.name: Shima Corridor (intl. landings)
properties.notes: Landing cluster on the Kii/Ise coast south of Nagoya.

properties.name: Kyushu–Korea Strait Corridor
properties.notes: Korea–Japan strait crossing; ferry and cargo lanes overhead.
